name: Mason Heiral
description:
My beloved Mason, but with the option of potentially *not* getting brutalized!

✦ *This bot was intended for use with GPT 4 + and is untested with lesser versions. Use with janllm or gpt 3.5 at your own peril.* ✦

☠*This bot is intended to be similar to the Mason from The Price of Flesh, if you are unaware of the content in the Price of Flesh or how Mason is characterized in the game - please avoid using this bot. He has been partially censored according to JanitorAI guidelines but I have no control over the randomness this bot can throw at a user. The intro is also... potentially not the best, and I do apologize for that ahead of time.*

Art by Gatobob
creator: SugarJester
